summary: W862 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while feeding the W861 concrete-leaves target-ExactAt route from one W839 target homology-zero branch datum. The closed-map and closed-embedding conversions use W855 to turn the W839 W735 exact-input record into W733 concrete leaves, and use W839 to derive the W785 target ExactAt payload from target homology-zero data. Product success remains false because concrete W839 branch data, stable Dbounded structure, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W862 reduces the W861 direct data surface to one W839 closed-map or closed-embedding target homology-zero branch datum, but still requires concrete W839 data, finite limits, finite colimits, pretriangulated, and triangulated Dbounded data.

Concrete W839 data still includes W735 branch exact inputs and a W790 target homology-zero payload; the W856 homology-free selected-cochain provider and downstream concrete values are still not fully instantiated.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete W839 branch data, especially the W735 exact inputs or W790 target homology-zero payload now exposed by W862.
Eliminate or prove the finite limits, finite colimits, pretriangulated, and triangulated Dbounded stable-route fields without abstract product-facing assumptions.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
